title: Temanisikecil
description: Educational worksheets for children aged 2–5 and coding worksheets for 5+. Learn while playing — motor skills, creativity, and logic.
longDescription: Temanisikecil is an educational product offering worksheets for children aged 2–5 and coding worksheets for ages 5+. It turns screen time into skill time — helping kids build motor skills, creativity, and logic while playing.

title: Planetarium Razan
description: An interactive 3D solar system and 28 constellations, with a cinematic tour, voice narration, and orchestral score — right in the browser.
longDescription: An interactive 3D planetarium. Explore the solar system and 28 constellations with a cinematic guided tour, voice narration, and an orchestral score — all rendered live in the browser.

title: Simulasi Sejarah Dunia
description: An interactive 3D globe that maps world history events across time and place — explore the past spatially.
longDescription: An interactive 3D globe that maps world-history events across time and place, letting you explore the past spatially. An educational visualization built from secondary sources.

title: Belajar Membaca
description: A reading app for Indonesian kids across 4 stages — letters, syllables, words, sentences — with Indonesian voice-over and playful animations.
longDescription: A reading app for Indonesian children structured in four stages — letters, syllables, words, and sentences — complete with Indonesian voice-over and playful animations.

title: Godzilla Types
description: An encyclopedia of 12 Godzilla incarnations across the Showa, Heisei, Millennium, Reiwa, and MonsterVerse eras — height, weight, abilities, and films.
longDescription: An interactive encyclopedia of 12 Godzilla incarnations spanning the Showa, Heisei, Millennium, Reiwa, and MonsterVerse eras — with height, weight, abilities, and source films for each.
